bn.title: খরগোশ থেকে বাঁচাও 😱 | ZOONOMALY লাইভ 🔴 | #zoonomaly #hihunterlive
bn.description:
খরগোশ থেকে বাঁচো 😱 | জুনোমালি লাইভ 🔴 | #জুনোমালি #হাইহান্টারলাইভ

🎮 গেম: জুনোমালি
📱 স্ট্রিমের ধরণ: ভার্টিকাল লাইভ স্ট্রিম
👾 চ্যানেল: @হাইহান্টারলাইভ
সতর্কবার্তা:- এই গেমে কিছু জাম্প স্কেয়ার থাকতে পারে, তাই তার জন্য প্রস্তুত থাকুন।

.

অস্বীকৃতি: দয়া করে আমার ভিডিওতে আমি যাদের সম্পর্কে কথা বলি তাদের কাউকে অযথা ঘৃণা করবেন না, এই চ্যানেলটি মানুষকে বিনোদন দেওয়ার জন্য এবং আমি সাধারণত ব্যক্তিবিশেষের পরিবর্তে তাদের কার্যকলাপ নিয়ে মজা করি, দয়া করে ঘৃণা ছড়াবেন না, সবকিছুই হাসির জন্য।

কপিরাইট আইন ১৯৭৬-এর ১০৭ ধারা অনুযায়ী কপিরাইট দাবিত্যাগ, সমালোচনা, মন্তব্য, সংবাদ প্রতিবেদন, শিক্ষাদান, বৃত্তি এবং গবেষণার মতো উদ্দেশ্যে "ন্যায্য ব্যবহারের" অনুমতি দেওয়া হয়েছে। ন্যায্য ব্যবহার হলো কপিরাইট আইন দ্বারা অনুমোদিত একটি ব্যবহার যা অন্যথায় লঙ্ঘনকারী হতে পারে। অলাভজনক, শিক্ষামূলক বা ব্যক্তিগত ব্যবহারের ক্ষেত্রে ন্যায্য ব্যবহারের পাল্লাই ভারী হয়।

snippet.description:
Kiran Prajapati Presents...

Ghardo Thayo Samjo Nahi Ramnu Naam Leta - DHUN - Kiran Prajapati - ઘરડો થયો તોય સમજ્યો નહિ - Gujrati Bhajan

Title : Ghardo Thayo Samjo Nahi Ramnu Naam Leta - DHUN - Kiran Prajapati - ઘરડો થયો તોય સમજ્યો નહિ - Gujrati Bhajan

Singer: Kiran Prajapati 
Music: Manoj Vimal 
Mixing: Hardik Sagar
Dhun Mandli: Botad  
Video: Maruti Movies (Shailesh Patel)
Editing: Studio Lights View
Disign:  Kaushal Prajapati
Light : Nilkanth Light Botad
Lable: Kiran Prajapati

LYRICS:
ઘરડો થયો તોય સમજ્યો નહીં તું રામ નું નામ લેતા રે 
છોકરા તારું કહ્યું ન માને તોય શિખામણ દેતો રે 
ઘરડો થયો તોય સમજ્યો નહીં તું રામ નું નામ લેતા રે 

ક્રોધ આવે તને ઘડી ઘડી તું રાતો પીળો થાતો રે 
ક્રોધ કરે તારું કાંઈ નહિ વળે પાછળથી પસ્તાતો રે....
ઘરડો થયો તોય સમજ્યો નહીં તું રામ નું નામ લેતા રે 

પૈસાનો તે પોટલો બાંધ્યો કોઈને કાંઈ ન દેતો રે 
ઘરના વ્યવહાર હું ચલાવું એમ વારંવાર કહેતો રે...
ઘરડો થયો તોય સમજ્યો નહીં તું રામ નું નામ લેતા રે 

જીભને સ્વાદે શીરો પુરી ના ભજીયા તો બહુ ભાવે રે 
દાંત ગયા ને ચોકઠું આવ્યું સુખડી ચણા ચાવે રે
ઘરડો થયો તોય સમજ્યો નહીં તું રામ નું નામ લેતા રે 

ખૂણામાં તારી ખાટલી ઢાળી તોય નજરું રાખતો રે 
સેવા મારી કોઈ ન કરે એમ બધાયને કહેતો રે...
ઘરડો થયો તોય સમજ્યો નહીં તું રામ નું નામ લેતા રે 

મારું મારું કરી મરી જવાના સાથે કાંઈ ન આવે રે 
વળાવવા તારી પાછળ આવે ફૂટેલી દોણી લઈ રે....
ઘરડો થયો તોય સમજ્યો નહીં તું રામ નું નામ લેતા રે 

સગા વાલા ભેડા થઈને બરાડા બહુ પાડે રે 
પેટ ભરીને લાડવા ખાશે બારમાના દાડે રે 
ઘરડો થયો તોય સમજ્યો નહીં તું રામ નું નામ લેતા રે 

વરસી તારી વાળી દેશે દીકરા ભાગ પાડે રે 
દીકરી તારી રોતી રહેશે કઈ ના આપે દાન રે...
ઘરડો થયો તોય સમજ્યો નહીં તું રામ નું નામ લેતા રે 

હાથે કરેલું સાથે રહેશે પુણ્યદાન તારું રે 
અંતે તારી સાથે આવશે રામજી નું પ્યારું નામ રે 
ઘરડો થયો તોય સમજ્યો નહીં તું રામ નું નામ લેતા રે 

પુરુષોત્તમ કહેતા જોજે બાજી તારા હાથમાં રે 
રામ ભજીલ્યો ભવ તજીલ્યો એમ વારંવાર કહેતા રે ....
ઘરડો થયો તોય સમજ્યો નહીં તું રામ નું નામ લેતા રે 
_______________________________________________

snippet.title: मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा | Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha Apne Vrindavan Ko | Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan
snippet.description:
#radha #radharani #radhakrishna
#radha #radharani #radhakrishna #radhabhajan #bhajanlyrics #krishnabhajan 
 
मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा |Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha Apne Vrindavan Ko|Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan#radha 
मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा | Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha Apne Vrindavan Ko | Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan
मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा | Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha Apne Vrindavan Ko | Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan
मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा | Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha Apne Vrindavan Ko | Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan
मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा | Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha Apne Vrindavan Ko | Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan


मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा | Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha Apne Vrindavan Ko | Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan

Song: मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा | Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha Apne Vrindavan Ko | Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan


Lose yourself in the sacred lanes of Vrindavan with this soulful rendition: "Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha." This Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan captures the deep desire of a devotee to become a peacock in the gardens of Nidhivan, just to be close to Radha Rani and Krishna.

मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा - वृंदावन की इस पावन धुन में खो जाएँ। Palak  Bhakti आपके लिए लेकर आया है श्री राधा-कृष्ण की महिमा का एक ऐसा भजन जो आपके हृदय को शांति और आनंद से भर देगा।

यह मधुर और भावपूर्ण Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan ब्रज की पावन भावना और राधा-कृष्ण के दिव्य प्रेम को समर्पित है।
“मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधाअपने वृंदावन को” – यह पंक्ति भक्त की उस विनम्र प्रार्थना को दर्शाती है, जहाँ वह ब्रजधाम में मोर बनकर भी राधा-कृष्ण के चरणों में रहना चाहता है।

यह भजन ध्यान, जप, सुबह-शाम की पूजा, वृंदावन भक्ति, कीर्तन और मन की शांति के लिए अत्यंत उपयुक्त है। इसकी शांत धुन और प्रेमपूर्ण शब्द आत्मा को सुकून देते हैं और मन को वृंदावन की गलियों में ले जाते हैं।

Vrindavan Essence: Experience the 'Brij Ras' from the comfort of your home.

Soulful Peace: Perfect for morning meditation or evening relaxation.

📌 Keywords: Mohe Mor Banaiyo To Banaiyo Vrindavan Ko, मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा, Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan, Vrindavan Bhajan, Radha Krishna Song 2026, Bunty Thakur Bhajan, Krishna Meditation Music, Radha Rani Bhajan, Braj Bhakti Song

In this intense showdown, I went to war against @STEEL-WING for control of MOJA! Alliances were tested, strategies were pushed to the limit, and only one side could come out on top.

snippet.title: Nagan Si Lugai Tera Balam Chota (Official Video) Farmani Naaz | New haryanvi Song | Hema| Naaz Music
snippet.description:
#NaganSiLugai #farmaninaaz i #terabalamchota #Naazmusic 

Song  - Nagan Si Lugai | नागन सी लुगाई 
Artist   -  Hema Chaudhary.Rahul Mulheda , Varunesh Baisla
Lyrics  - varunesh baisla , Anuj Mulheda 
Music - Gaurav Panchal (Gr Music -8708626865)
Singer - Farmani Naaz , Manish Tyagi 
Video Shoot - Panchal Productions
Director -  Rahul Mulheda , Nitin Panchal 
Editor - Nitin Panchal 
Publicity Design - Rahul mulheda
Publisher - Naaz Music
Label -   Naaz Music
Production - Rahul Mulheda
Special Thanks - Naaz Music And Team
For any query:- Email - farmaninaaz786@gmail.com

                 Lyrics
Mhare khat khatoli ka na tota
ra mahre khat khatoli ka na tota

tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri
tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 

Lakh lakh ke shut ma phru
Sava lakh ki jutti re

Chandi ka mera vir al nada
Delhi ke ma kotti re

tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 
tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 

Up ke ma dunga maru halle delhi sari ri
Dur dur ta nigah gadave rande cheel juhari ri

Love you bhabhi

tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 
tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 

do balka ki ma bngi ma lagu kati kavari si 
Dhunge mere jholl marre

Chotti nag bnari ri
Bin hi bja du kya

tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 
tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri


म्हारे खाट खटोली का ना टोटा
र म्हारे खाट खटोली का ना टोटा 

तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री
तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 

लाख लाख के सूट मै पहरू सवा लाख की जूती रे
चांदी का मेरा वायरल नाड़ा दिल्ली के मै कोठी र

तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 
तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 

यूपी के मै ढुंगा मारू हाले दिल्ली सारी री
दूर दूर त निगाह गड़ावे रांडे छेल जुहारी री
लव यू भाभी

तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 
तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 

दो बालका की मां बनगी मै लागू कती कवारी सी
ढुंगे मेरे झोल मार र चोटी नाग बनारी री
बीन ही बजा दू क्या

तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 
तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री

This Haryanvi Song Sung by rahul mulheda. Music given manish tyagi. Penned by Ravi Rangi. Copyright & Music label by NAAZ MUSIC

snippet.title: *OMG*THE MOST EXPENSIVE CAR… $100M!😱1000+ SUPER WHEEL SPIN | FORZA HORIZON 6
snippet.description:
🔥 I MODIFIED the Koenigsegg Jesko and pushed it to insane top speed — 567+ KMPH in Forza Horizon 6! 😱
In this video, I’m using the Logitech G29 steering wheel for a super realistic driving experience and going full send on the highway/top speed run.

Agar aapko Forza Horizon 6 tuning, Jesko top speed build, wheel gameplay, aur crazy high-speed runs pasand hain, then this one is for you!
India + US Forza community, let’s see if we can hit even more speed comment your best top speed and your setup! 👇

What’s inside this video
Koenigsegg Jesko modified / tuned build
567+ KMPH top speed attempt
Logitech G29 wheel + cockpit style gameplay
Smooth highway pulls, control + handling at extreme speed

Subscribe to our Other YouTube Channels

https://www.youtube.com/@Dattraxplays
https://www.youtube.com/@DattraxG
https://www.youtube.com/@DattraxVlogss
https://www.youtube.com/@DattraxReact

#dattraxgaming #forzahorizon6 #game
#technogamerz #notgamerfleet #anshubisht

Watch Girish Kumar & Shruti Haasan's romantic journey unfold with the magical voices of Atif Aslam & Shreya Ghoshal in this unforgettable melody from Ramaiya Vastavaiya. ✨


Song Credits :
Singers : Atif Aslam, Shreya Ghoshal
Music Director : Sachin Jigar
Lyrics Writer: Priya Panchal
Mixed & Mastered By Eric Pillai (Future Sound of Bombay)

Movie Credits :
Starring : Girish Kumar, Shruti Haasan, Sonu Sood, Randhir Kapoor, Poonam Dhillon, Vinod Khanna, Satish Shah, Naseer, Paresh Ganatra
Directed by : Prabhudheva
Produced by : Kumar Taurani
Director of Photography : Kiran Deohans

Song Lyrics :

Main Mera Dil Aur Tum Ho Yahan,
Phir Kyun Ho Palkein Jhukayein Wahan,
Tum Sa Haseen Maine Dekha Nahin,
Tum Isse Pehle The Jaane Kahan...
Jeene Laga Hoon Pehle Se Zyada,
Pehle Se Zyada Tumpe Marne Laga...
Hummm...Hummmm....

Rehte Ho Aa Ke Jo, Tum Paas Mere,
Tham Jaye Pal Yeh Wahin, Bass Main Yeh Sochun...
Sochun Main Tham Jaye Pal Yeh,
Paas Mere Jab Ho Tum...(2)
Chalti Hai Saansein, Pehle Se Zyada Dil Theharne Laga...
Hummmm....Hummmm....

Tanhaiyon Mein Tujhe Dhoondhe Mera Dil,
Har Pal Yeh Tujhko Hi, Soche Bhala Kyun,

Tanhai Mein Dhoondhe Tujhe Dil,
Har Pal Tujhko Soche, (2)
Milne Lage Dil, Pehle Se Zyada,
Pehle Se Zyada, Ishq Hone Laga
Hummmm... Hummmm...

snippet.description:
వేంకటేశ్వర స్వామి పాటలు | Venkateswara Swamy Songs | Suprabhatam with Lyrics | Govinda Namalu Telugu

Experience the divine grace of Lord Sri Venkateswara Swamy through this beautiful collection of devotional songs, Govinda Namalu, and Sri Venkateswara Suprabhatam with Lyrics. Listen with devotion and seek the blessings of Tirumala Srinivasa for peace, prosperity, happiness, and spiritual strength.

This devotional collection includes:
✨ Govinda Namalu Telugu
✨ Sri Venkateswara Suprabhatam
✨ Sri Venkatesha Stotram
✨ Venkateswara Manasasmarami
✨ Sri Venkateswara Ashtottaram
✨ Garuda Gamana Tava
✨ Venkateswara Chalisa

May Lord Venkateswara Swamy bless you and your family with good health, success, and abundance.

Govinda Govinda! Srinivasa Govinda! Venkataramana Govinda!
